overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a steady walk through an industrial dockyard district. The scene features prominent industrial architecture including shipping containers, overhead metal walkways, and a large cylindrical silo with skull graffiti, set under a bright clear sky with warm sunlight casting long shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial loading yard with stacked shipping containers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the asphalt road through the industrial district, passing rows of shipping containers on the right

entered.detail: large dark metal cylindrical tank with distinctive white skull graffiti painted on the side
rusted industrial steel bridge with railings spanning across the street overhead
stacked metal shipping containers and wooden crates along the right sidewalk
green metal chain-link fence running parallel to the sidewalk on the left
tall industrial street lamp with horizontal red marker on top

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through an industrial dockyard area. A massive cylindrical silo with skull graffiti dominates the left horizon, while stacked shipping containers line the right side. The camera moves steadily forward under a rusted metal overhead walkway, with green chain-link fencing visible along the left sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse street with pedestrian walkway

events.description: passing the shipping container yard, transitioning to concrete warehouse buildings on the right
pedestrians become visible walking along the left sidewalk in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing down the industrial road, approaching pedestrians visible ahead on the left sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket walking along the fence line toward the camera

entered.detail: tan concrete industrial building with loading dock and metal roll-up doors
tropical palm tree visible behind the warehouse buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the container yard to a warehouse district, with a large concrete industrial building now on the right. The cylindrical silo with skull graffiti grows larger on the left as the camera approaches. Pedestrians appear in the distance walking along the left sidewalk, and palm trees become visible behind the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection approach with multiple pathways

events.description: increased pedestrian activity visible near buildings on the right side

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection ahead with the large silo now dominating the left side of the frame

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered near the warehouse entrance on the right

entered.detail: tall modern glass and steel skyscraper visible in the background beyond the industrial buildings
tall thin industrial smokestack visible in the distance at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches an intersection with the cylindrical silo now very prominent on the left. More pedestrians are visible near the warehouse buildings on the right. The camera continues forward under the overhead walkway, with a distant modern skyscraper contrasting against the industrial foreground, suggesting the edge of the industrial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through an industrial dockyard that gradually transitions into a bustling warehouse district on the edge of a modern city. It begins by moving steadily forward past stacked shipping containers and green chain-link fencing, with a massive cylindrical silo featuring skull graffiti dominating the left horizon. As the camera passes under a rusted metal overhead walkway, the container yard gives way to a warehouse district where a large concrete industrial building emerges on the right and palm trees appear behind the structures. The scene then expands toward an intersection as the graffiti-covered silo grows more prominent and pedestrians become visible along the sidewalks. Finally, the camera continues its forward trajectory under the walkway, revealing a distant modern skyscraper that contrasts with the industrial foreground.
